title: viola pilushanensis
intro: Viola pilushanensis, a type of wild viola plant, is a flowering perennial native to China, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola pilushanensis include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
